title: Verify audit-trail integrity
description: Confirm the audit store is append-only and that its records cannot be silently altered or dropped.
body: Steps: 1. Inspect the audit sink's write path and permissions to confirm the application role cannot UPDATE/DELETE. 2. If hash-chained, recompute the chain and confirm it is unbroken. 3. Attempt a modification/deletion in a test environment and confirm it fails or is detected. 4. Sample records and confirm each carries actor, time, action, and before/after. 5. Record gaps. Rollback point: test environment only, never production records. Validation: tampering is provably blocked or detectable, and required fields are present on sampled records.
